user.title: Taiwan CWA Weather Setup
user.description:
Get your free API key at [opendata.cwa.gov.tw](https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/). Register → Member Center → Apply for API Key.

請至 [opendata.cwa.gov.tw](https://opendata.cwa.gov.tw/) 免費申請 API Key。註冊後進入「會員中心」→「API授權碼申請」。

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to CWA API. Please check your network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please verify your CWA API key.
error.city_not_found: City not found in CWA data. Please select a valid city.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

init.title: Manage Cities
init.description: Select the cities to monitor. Each city creates 4 sensors (weather, rain probability, min/max temperature). Changes take effect after reloading.

error.no_cities: Please select at least one city.
